member.name: T:TechStoreController.Controllers.AuthController
member.summary: Auth endpoints: dev token (lấy JWT từ Clerk theo userId để test Swagger).

member.name: M:TechStoreController.Controllers.AuthController.GetDevToken(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: [Dev] Lấy JWT cho user từ Clerk (để dán vào Swagger Authorize). Lấy userId từ Clerk Dashboard → Users → chọn user → copy User ID (user_xxx). User phải có ít nhất một session active (đã đăng nhập từ app trước đó).

member.name: T:TechStoreController.Controllers.ChatController
member.summary: AI Chat Bot - tích hợp Mega LLM (OpenAI-compatible)

member.name: M:TechStoreController.Controllers.ChatController.Diagnostic(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Kiểm tra cấu hình Mega LLM

member.name: M:TechStoreController.Controllers.ChatController.SendMessage(BAL.DTOs.Chat.ChatRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gửi tin nhắn đến AI chat bot và nhận phản hồi

member.name: T:TechStoreController.Controllers.ClerkWebhookController
member.summary: Controller để nhận và xử lý webhook từ Clerk

member.name: M:TechStoreController.Controllers.ClerkWebhookController.HandleWebhook
member.summary: Endpoint để nhận webhook từ Clerk

member.name: M:TechStoreController.Controllers.OrdersController.CreateShippingOrder(System.Guid)
member.summary: Tạo đơn vận chuyển GHN cho order đã confirmed

member.name: M:TechStoreController.Controllers.OrdersController.GetGhnOrderStatus(System.Guid)
member.summary: Lấy và cập nhật trạng thái đơn hàng từ GHN API (Pull model)

member.name: M:TechStoreController.Controllers.UsersController.GetMe
member.summary: Who Am I

member.name: M:TechStoreController.Controllers.UsersController.GetUserById(System.Guid)
member.summary: Who Is That (Staff/Admin)

member.name: M:TechStoreController.Controllers.UsersController.GetUserByClerkId(System.String)
member.summary: Tìm user = Clerk ID / chỉ test cho clerk dashboard

member.name: M:TechStoreController.Controllers.UsersController.CreateUser(BAL.DTOs.User.CreateUserRequestDto)
member.summary: Tạo user mới ( sau khi đăng ký = clerk , ko xài )

member.name: M:TechStoreController.Controllers.UsersController.UpdateUser(System.Guid,BAL.DTOs.User.UpdateUserRequestDto)
member.summary: Update my self ( just myself)

member.name: M:TechStoreController.Controllers.UsersController.DeleteUser(System.Guid)
member.summary: Delete user / soft delete (only own user or Admin).

member.name: T:TechStoreController.Helpers.JwtHelper
member.summary: Helper to read userId and role from claims (set after Clerk token validation in OnTokenValidated).

member.name: M:TechStoreController.Helpers.JwtHelper.GetUserId(System.Security.Claims.ClaimsPrincipal)
member.summary: Get user ID from JWT claims (prefer backend userId Guid added in OnTokenValidated).

member.name: M:TechStoreController.Helpers.JwtHelper.GetClerkId(System.Security.Claims.ClaimsPrincipal)
member.summary: Get Clerk ID from JWT claims (sub or clerkId added in OnTokenValidated).

member.name: M:TechStoreController.Helpers.JwtHelper.GetUserRole(System.Security.Claims.ClaimsPrincipal)
member.summary: Get user role from JWT claims

member.name: M:TechStoreController.Helpers.JwtHelper.HasRole(System.Security.Claims.ClaimsPrincipal,System.String[])
member.summary: Check if user has required role

member.name: T:TechStoreController.Middleware.ExceptionHandlingMiddleware
member.summary: Global exception handling middleware with error codes

member.name: T:TechStoreController.Middleware.RequestIdMiddleware
member.summary: Request ID middleware for logging correlation

member.name: T:TechStoreController.Services.ClerkBackendApiService
member.summary: Gọi Clerk Backend API qua HTTP. Cần cấu hình Clerk:SecretKey và Clerk:BackendApiUrl (mặc định https://api.clerk.com).

member.name: T:TechStoreController.Services.ClerkJwksProvider
member.summary: Fetches and caches Clerk JWKS; provides signing keys for JWT Bearer validation.

member.name: T:TechStoreController.Services.ClerkJwtBearerPostConfigure
member.summary: Verify cái JWT của clerk

member.name: T:TechStoreController.Services.IClerkBackendApiService
member.summary: Gọi Clerk Backend API (list sessions, get session token) để phục vụ dev/test (lấy JWT từ userId).

member.name: M:TechStoreController.Services.IClerkBackendApiService.GetSessionTokenForUserAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lấy session JWT cho user (user phải có ít nhất một session active - đã đăng nhập từ app trước đó). Gọi Clerk: GET sessions?user_id= → POST sessions/{id}/tokens/default.

member.name: T:TechStoreController.Services.IClerkJwksProvider
member.summary: Provides Clerk JWKS signing keys for JWT Bearer validation. Caches keys and refreshes periodically.

member.name: M:TechStoreController.Services.IClerkJwksProvider.GetSigningKeys
member.summary: Returns the current signing keys from Clerk JWKS (cached). Used by AddJwtBearer IssuerSigningKeyResolver.

member.name: T:TechStoreController.Services.OrderExpiryScannerService
member.summary: Background service to auto-cancel orders that are pending payment for more than 24 hours
